gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the repository's front page with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights and updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel art robot (Monitor Robot) holding a freshly printed newspaper or painting a sign that says 'NEWS', with the bee mascot reading it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a freshly printed newspaper, while the bee mascot reads it happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NEWS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
